title: badilloa guantivana var. guicanensis
intro: Badilloa guantivana var. guicanensis is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. The medicinal properties of Badilloa guantivana var. guicanensis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Badilloa guantivana var. guicanensis are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be dried, crushed, or infused in hot water to create teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
